title: SimplyCubed Skill Config
description: Authored metadata for one listed Claude Agent Skill. The skill source is referenced (not vendored) at an immutable upstream commit SHA. Certification/scan results are produced by CI into <slug>.scan.json and are NOT authored here.

slug.description: URL/install slug and plugin name; must match the filename. Install is /plugin install <slug>@simplycubed.

description.description: One-line description shown in the catalog.

version.description: SemVer label for this listing. The upstream SHA is the true identity; bump this only on a re-certified change.

status.description: Only 'active' skills are published to the marketplace + storefront.

sha.description: Full 40-hex commit SHA. Immutable pin: never a tag or branch. Certification and install both bind to this exact commit.

path.description: Optional subdirectory within the repo when the skill lives in a subfolder (no leading/trailing slash).

license.description: SPDX identifier of the upstream skill's license. Permissive licenses only; copyleft and unlicensed are rejected.

homepage.description: Optional canonical homepage/source URL (defaults to the upstream repo).
